title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
summary: Clean Code by Robert C. Martin is a must-read for developers, providing practical advice and examples to write clear and maintainable code. It's an invaluable guide for those aiming for coding excellence.

title: Phython Crash Course
author: Eric Matthes
summary: Python Crash Course merits a commendable 4/5 stars for its beginner-friendly approach, hands-on exercises, and practical projects. It falls just short of perfection due to a slight lack of depth in advanced topics. Overall, a solid choice for Python learners.
